failure_modes.text: A universal process can fail simply because different incident types were never separated before standardization.
failure_modes.source_quote: universal process is tempting but incidents are structurally heterogeneous
failure_modes.mitigation: Separate incident types before standardizing the process; a universal procedure that ignores category differences will fail the edge cases.

failure_modes.text: Representativeness can assign a case to the wrong bucket based on salient traits instead of evidence.
failure_modes.source_quote: labels are assigned from salient traits instead of distributional evidence
failure_modes.mitigation: Challenge representativeness assignments with evidence: check whether the salient trait that drove categorization is actually predictive of the outcome.

failure_modes.text: Category lock-in turns yesterday's useful buckets into today's blinders.
failure_modes.mitigation: Revisit categories periodically; yesterday's useful buckets become today's blinders when the environment changes.

premortem_questions.text: What evidence would show these cases are not one category but several, requiring different response logic?
premortem_questions.source_quote: What evidence would show the incident types in scope are not one category but two or more

premortem_questions.text: Which criteria belong in separate MECE branches before we start evaluating options?
What inherited bucket is replacing real decomposition of the underlying mechanism?
premortem_questions.source_quote: inherited buckets replace decomposition of underlying mechanisms

heuristics.text: Use category decisions as advance fences against in-the-moment impulse and exception making.
heuristics.source_quote: onetime, advance choice about what options you can and cannot choose

heuristics.text: Break the problem down with logic trees before writing the rule that will govern future cases.
Force a category summary sentence after grouping so the bucket earns its place.

curation_notes.summary: Chunk set stays close to the source's strongest failure modes, premortem questions, and repeatable heuristics.
donor_drops: Did not widen the chunk surface beyond clearly source-backed failure, premortem, and heuristic material.
open_questions: Some chunk text is compressed for operational reuse, but each item stays traceable to explicit source language.

allies: Relation-rich ally material was left for Wave 3 instead of being smuggled into chunk text.
antagonists: Bias and conflict material stronger as first-order relations was deferred to Wave 3.
structured_tensions: Any higher-order candidacy remains observational only in batch artifacts.
